title: damage tilt
description: Toggle the damage tilt screen effect on and off with a configurable hotkey. Works on any server and singleplayer. Client-side only, requires Fabric API.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6ghHTqpMMEI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe># DamageTilt

**Toggle the damage tilt screen effect on and off with a configurable hotkey.**

Ever get annoyed by your screen tilting every time you take damage? Or maybe you *want* it back? DamageTilt lets you toggle it instantly — no restart needed.

---

## Features

- 🎮 **Configurable hotkey** — set your key on first launch
- 🔄 **Instant toggle** — press your hotkey anytime in-game
- 💾 **Saves automatically** — your preference persists between sessions
- 🌐 **Works everywhere** — singleplayer and multiplayer servers
- ⚙️ **Change anytime** — hotkey editable in Options → Controls

---

## Installation

1. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) for any version with this mod
2. Drop the `.jar` into your `.minecraft/mods/` folder
3. Launch Minecraft

---

## Usage

On first launch a popup will appear — press any key to set your hotkey.  
Press it in-game to toggle damage tilt **ON** or **OFF**.  
A message in the action bar confirms the current state.

---

## Compatibility

| | |
|---|---|
| Minecraft | 1.21.4 |
| Mod Loader | Fabric |
| Side | Client only |
| Required | Fabric API |
